title: ixora coffeoides
intro: Ixora coffeoides, also known as the Red Eyed Mangostana or Ixora, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Ixora coffeoides include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Ixora coffeoides is often used in traditional medicine to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
